mapper.select:
SELECT k.knowledge_id, k.name, k.type, k.file_size, k.mime_type, k.customer_id, c.company_name AS customer_name, k.employee_id, e.realname AS employee_name, k.relation_id, r.name AS relation_name, k.summary, k.content_text, k.status, k.weknora_parse_status, k.upload_user_id, u.realname AS upload_user_name, k.create_time FROM crm_knowledge k LEFT JOIN crm_customer c ON k.customer_id = c.customer_id LEFT JOIN manager_user e ON k.employee_id = e.user_id LEFT JOIN crm_relation r ON k.relation_id = r.relation_id LEFT JOIN manager_user u ON k.upload_user_id = u.user_id WHERE k.status != 2
AND (k.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR k.content_text LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%'))
AND k.type = #{query.type}
AND ( LOWER(COALESCE(k.mime_type, '')) LIKE 'image/%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(k.name, '')) ~ '\.(png|jpg|jpeg|gif|webp|svg|bmp|avif)$' )
AND ( LOWER(COALESCE(k.mime_type, '')) LIKE 'text/%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(k.mime_type, '')) LIKE '%word%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(k.mime_type, '')) LIKE '%msword%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(k.name, '')) ~ '\.(doc|docx|txt|md|markdown|json|xml)$' )
AND ( LOWER(COALESCE(k.mime_type, '')) LIKE '%excel%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(k.mime_type, '')) LIKE '%spreadsheet%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(k.mime_type, '')) LIKE '%csv%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(k.name, '')) ~ '\.(xls|xlsx|csv)$' )
AND ( LOWER(COALESCE(k.mime_type, '')) LIKE '%powerpoint%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(k.mime_type, '')) LIKE '%presentation%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(k.name, '')) ~ '\.(ppt|pptx)$' )
AND ( LOWER(COALESCE(k.mime_type, '')) LIKE '%pdf%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(k.name, '')) LIKE '%.pdf' )
AND ( LOWER(COALESCE(k.mime_type, '')) LIKE 'audio/%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(k.name, '')) ~ '\.(mp3|wav|m4a|aac|ogg|oga|opus|flac|weba)$' )
AND ( LOWER(COALESCE(k.mime_type, '')) LIKE 'video/%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(k.name, '')) ~ '\.(mp4|webm|mov|m4v|avi|mkv|ogv|3gp)$' )
AND 1 = 0
AND k.customer_id = #{query.customerId}
AND k.employee_id = #{query.employeeId}
AND k.relation_id = #{query.relationId}
AND k.upload_user_id = #{query.uploadUserId}
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM crm_knowledge_tag t WHERE t.knowledge_id = k.knowledge_id AND t.tag_name = #{query.tag})
ORDER BY k.create_time DESC

SELECT k.knowledge_id, k.name, k.type, k.file_size, k.mime_type, k.customer_id, c.company_name AS customer_name, k.employee_id, e.realname AS employee_name, k.relation_id, r.name AS relation_name, k.summary, k.status, k.weknora_parse_status, k.upload_user_id, u.realname AS upload_user_name, k.create_time FROM crm_knowledge k LEFT JOIN crm_customer c ON k.customer_id = c.customer_id LEFT JOIN manager_user e ON k.employee_id = e.user_id LEFT JOIN crm_relation r ON k.relation_id = r.relation_id LEFT JOIN manager_user u ON k.upload_user_id = u.user_id WHERE k.knowledge_id = #{knowledgeId}
mapper.sql: k.status != 2 AND ( LOWER(COALESCE(k.name, '')) LIKE LOWER(#{pattern}) OR LOWER(COALESCE(k.summary, '')) LIKE LOWER(#{pattern}) OR LOWER(COALESCE(k.content_text, '')) LIKE LOWER(#{pattern}) OR LOWER(COALESCE(c.company_name, '')) LIKE LOWER(#{pattern}) )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crm_knowledge k LEFT JOIN crm_customer c ON k.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE

SELECT 'knowledge' AS type, k.knowledge_id AS record_id, k.name AS title, CONCAT_WS(' · ', NULLIF(c.company_name, ''), NULLIF(k.type, '')) AS subtitle, COALESCE(NULLIF(k.summary, ''), LEFT(k.content_text, 220)) AS content, k.customer_id, CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS contact_id, k.create_time AS event_time, k.create_time, k.update_time FROM crm_knowledge k LEFT JOIN crm_customer c ON k.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE ORDER BY k.create_time DESC NULLS LAST, k.knowledge_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
